details.desc:
Job Temple Uniques that spawn in designated rooms.
Selket - Sanctum of Restriction
Neith - Sanctum of Blue Eye.
rewards: Fixed 20x Legend Silver Coins for killer party

details.desc:
Job Temple Uniques that spawn in designated rooms.
Isis - Sanctum of Attonement
Anubis - Sanctum of Punishment.
rewards: Fixed 20x Legend Silver Coins for killer party

details.desc:
Job Temple Uniques that spawn in designated rooms.
Sanctum of Immortality
rewards: Fixed 20x Legend Silver Coins for killer party

details.desc: The legendary unique residing in the heart of the Qin-Shi Tomb. There are 5x uniques to defeat inside the B5 cave and 5x more inside the B6 before you even get to The White Viper.
A legendary unique that requires a large group of players to defeat. One of the most challenging and rewarding encounters in the game.
A classic team-based event where players fight to steal the opponent's flag and bring it to their base while defending their own flag.
rewards: Win: 20 Legends Gold Coins + 5x Magic Pop cards
Draw: 15 Legends Gold Coins  + 3x Magic Pop cards
Loss: 10 Legends Gold Coins + 1x Magic Pop card

details.desc: Fast-paced combat mode where teams earn points by killing opponents and monsters, with the highest score winning the match.
rewards: Win: 20 Legends Gold Coins + 5x Magic Pop cards
Draw: 15 Legends Gold Coins  + 3x Magic Pop cards
Loss: 10 Legends Gold Coins + 1x Magic Pop card

details.desc: A strategic team battle where players fight to capture and hold a central flag. Coordinate your defense and outlast the enemy to earn Arena Coins through point accumulation
rewards: Win: 20 Legends Gold Coins + 5x Magic Pop cards
Draw: 15 Legends Gold Coins  + 3x Magic Pop cards
Loss: 10 Legends Gold Coins + 1x Magic Pop card
Top 1: 50x Legends Gold Coins + 50,000,000 Gold + 10x Magic Pop cards + Gladiator title
Top 2: 40x Legends Gold Coins + 40,000,000 Gold + 8x Magic Pop cards
Top 3: 30x Legends Gold Coins + 30,000,000 Gold + 7x Magic Pop cards, Top 4: 20x Legends Gold Coins + 20,000,000 Gold + 5x Magic Pop cards
Top 5: 10x Legends Gold Coins + 10,000,000 Gold + 3x Magic Pop cards
+2 Honor Points for all TOP 5 players
Everyone else with 1 or more kills: 2x Legends Gold Coins + 2,000,000 Gold + 2x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Others: 1x Legends Gold Coin + 1,000,000 Gold + 1x Magic Pop card + 1 Honor Point

details.desc: Time-limited event where all special trade routes are enabled
A brutal survival event where players fight until only one remains. No allies, no mercy—stay alive at all costs.
rewards: Winner: 50x Legends Gold Coins + 50,000,000 Gold + 10x Magic Pop cards + Last Stand title + 2 Honor Points
Everyone else with 1 or more kills: 2x Legends Gold Coins + 2,000,000 Gold + 2x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Others: 1x Legends Gold Coin + 1,000,000 Gold + 1x Magic Pop card + 1 Honor Point

details.desc: Daily Job Party PvP Event where you get points by killing other job and killing Unique that spawns in the middle.
rewards: Win: 20 Legends Gold Coins + 20,000,000 Gold + 5x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Draw: 15 Legends Gold Coins + 15,000,000 Gold + 3x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Loss: 10 Legends Gold Coins + 10,000,000 Gold + 1x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
quests: Legends War of League kills quest

details.desc: Random PvP team event where you have to defend your tower and kill the enemy one.
rewards: Win: 25 Legends Gold Coins + 25,000,000 Gold + 10x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Draw: 20 Legends Gold Coins + 20,000,000 Gold + 5x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Loss: 15 Legends Gold Coins + 15,000,000 Gold + 3x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points

details.desc: PvP event between the Guilds. Each guild 8/8 party can register for the event and fight against other guilds to earn points and rewards.
rewards: Win: 50 Legends Gold Coins + 100,000,000 Gold + 10x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Draw: 30 Legends Gold Coins + 50,000,000 Gold + 5x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Loss: 20 Legends Gold Coins + 30,000,000 Gold + 3x Magic Pop cards + 2 Honor Points
Unique: 1x 11D Seal of Nova item, 2x 11D Immortal Stone, 1x 11D Astral Stone, 8x Magic Pop Cards, 8x Gold and Silver coins

details.desc: The ultimate large-scale siege event where guilds battle to capture and control fortress.
